title: Olfersia hybrida
taxonomy: Olfersia hybrida is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant belongs to the genus Olfersia, which is a group of flowering plants that are known for their showy inflorescences and hairy leaves. The classification of Olfersia hybrida is further supported by its botanical characteristics, such as its growth habit and leaf morphology. This classification helps to distinguish Olfersia hybrida from other related species within the family Acanthaceae.
